remission.spontaneous_remission_rate: No spontaneous remission; 5-year survival Stage I: 90%; Stage III/IV: 25-30%; most patients (75%) present at Stage III-IV
remission.best_intervention_remission_rate: Debulking surgery + carboplatin/paclitaxel: 70-80% initial response; PARP inhibitors (olaparib, rucaparib) maintenance in BRCA-mutant: 56% 5-year PFS vs 13.8% placebo (SOLO-1); bevacizumab maintenance: modest PFS benefit; dose-dense paclitaxel: 72.1% vs 65.1% OS at 3 years
remission.gap_size: Large — PARP inhibitors dramatically improve outcomes in BRCA-mutant patients; HRD testing not universal; no effective screening exists
remission.barrier_detail: BRCA1/2 and HRD testing is not universal despite major impact on PARP inhibitor eligibility; bevacizumab access limited by cost; most patients are diagnosed at advanced stage due to no screening modality; CA-125 + transvaginal ultrasound screening trials (UKCTOCS) failed to show mortality reduction
remission.last_soc_change: 2023 — mirvetuximab soravtansine (IMGN853, FRα-ADC) approved for FRα-high platinum-resistant OC; 2022 olaparib maintenance expanded; 2018 PARP inhibitor maintenance established; carboplatin/paclitaxel standard since 1990s
remission.outdated_treatments: CA-125 alone for monitoring without imaging integration; routine second-look laparoscopy (abandoned — clinical outcomes not improved despite resection at second-look); routine topotecan in all platinum-resistant before HER-targeted or FRα assessment
remission.adjunctive_emerging: Exercise during chemotherapy (reduces platinum-related neurotoxicity); intraperitoneal chemotherapy for optimal cytoreduction (HIPEC — OVHIPEC-2 trial completed — conflicting data on benefit); dietary fat reduction (observational data); PARP inhibitor combination strategies
remission.frontier_signal: Mirvetuximab soravtansine (FRα-ADC — approved 2022 for platinum-resistant); antibody-drug conjugates expanding; WEE1 inhibitor (adavosertib — Phase 2 data); anti-VEGF next generation; PARP inhibitor + IO (olaparib + pembrolizumab — KEYLYNK-001 Phase 3)
remission.notes: Manually curated from landmark trials, registries, and guidelines (disease_db_100.json). Protected from automated overwrite.
